case_study.name: OPERATION DESERT FOX / LEWINSKY DISTRACTION
case_study.primary_event: US bombs Iraq with Tomahawk missiles
case_study.distraction_event: Monica Lewinsky scandal explodes in media
case_study.result: Public attention DIVERTED from impeachment to military action

phase_2_distraction.name: EMOTIONAL DISTRACTION
phase_2_distraction.example: Monica Lewinsky sex scandal dominates media

phase_3_action.name: QUIET ACTION
phase_3_action.description: Execute actual agenda while public distracted

phase_4_reinforcement.name: NARRATIVE CONTROL
phase_4_reinforcement.example: History remembers Lewinsky, not Iraq bombing rationale

modern_patterns.distraction_type: Double distraction - two emotional events simultaneously
modern_patterns.evidence: Both stories escalate together, while third pattern advances quietly
People argue about culture while economy manipulated
Scandal breaks, terror warning issued same day
